testcase.name: test_create_notification_rule_sns
testcase.failure: tests/test_macie_notifications.py:74: in test_create_notification_rule_sns assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"enum","loc":["body","min_severity"],"msg":"Input should be 'Low', 'Medium' or 'High'","input":"HIGH","ctx":{"expected":"'Low', 'Medium' or 'High'"}}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_macie_notifications.py:102: in test_create_notification_rule_eventbridge assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 422 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_macie_notifications.py:127: in test_create_notification_rule_email assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 422 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_delete_notification_rule
testcase.failure: tests/test_macie_notifications.py:327: in test_delete_notification_rule assert create_response.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
